title: Tahmoor Coal Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in ASIC media release 25-141MR (and the preceding 25-113MR) as a GFG Alliance Group company subject to Supreme Court of NSW orders over alleged failure to lodge annual financial reports.
scope: Subject of Supreme Court of NSW civil proceedings (commenced June 2025) and consent orders (21 August 2025) over alleged failure to lodge its FY2024 annual report, per 25-141MR/25-113MR; In an excess emissions situation under the Safeguard Mechanism as at the 1 April 2026 compliance deadline, per the Clean Energy Regulator's January-March 2026 compliance update
